title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Royal Enfield

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Royal Enfield
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Royal Enfield in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Royal Enfield:
Royal Enfield is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Royal Enfield!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
